benefits.description: Night and day improvement in energy levels; clean energy without jitteriness; afternoon crash urge vanished
Brain fog entirely lifted; mental clarity dramatically improved
Increased motivation; tasks that were a chore feel like a walk in the park

protocol_notes: OP is 38 years old. Had tried every nootropic and energy supplement prior with little effect. Plans to run SS-31 for 8-12 weeks then follow with MOTS-c. Had severe afternoon crashes for several years prior, requiring daily ~20 minute naps. Never felt 100% after a bout of COVID. Was on fluoxetine years prior. Effects were steadily improving over the first 8+ days.
